_comment: Win 3 r2g-bench: a HELD-OUT design set scored per-checkpoint with partial credit (reuses Win 1 outcome_score: SR + mean/LCB outcome_score + per-stage reach). Runs whose design_name OR project-dir basename matches an entry here are flagged runs.is_bench=1 at ingest and EXCLUDED from the learning/suggest read (family medians, recipes, score tiebreaker) — so the bench measures whether later wins move the needle on UNSEEN designs. The is_bench flag is filtered ONLY at the learning read; a bench fail run still gets its orfs-fail-% failure_event and stays in the honesty count (data-integrity H3). NON-BLOCKING scoreboard: wins ship without a full bench run. The operator MATERIALIZES + ingests these (full multi-stage flows are hours each; k repeats per design for variance, reusing Win 2). Bands span the difficulty CLAUDE.md names: small / cell-dense / pin-heavy / crypto-SPN-congested.
